message:
feat(calibrate): add Kalman filter for resource smoothing and prediction

Implements a 2D Kalman filter tracking [value, velocity] for CPU, memory,
and I/O metrics. Handles missing measurements, achieves >50% noise
reduction, and produces prediction intervals for future values. Includes
preset configurations per metric type.

Closes process_triage-gkl7

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
